context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel game
context.role: Echo's primary resting place, horizontal bar for standing
context.screen_position: Center horizontal, y=80, x=24 to x=104
context.usage_scenario: Always visible. Echo stands on this perch in most states (idle, eating, happy, etc.). Static, never moves.

visual_specification.shape: Horizontal rectangular bar, slightly rounded ends
visual_specification.texture: Flat pixel art, minimal wood grain suggestion (1-2 horizontal lines)
visual_specification.outline: 1px darker brown (#5F574F) on top and bottom edges
visual_specification.details: Horizontal bar 80px wide, 4px tall. Centered horizontally (x=24 to x=104). Brown wood color (#AB5236). Subtle wood grain: 1-2 horizontal lines in slightly darker shade. Rounded ends (1px radius). Echo's feet rest on top edge at y=80.

relationships.shared_with: Brown color with Echo's beak and feet
relationships.differences_from: cage_bars: horizontal vs vertical, brown vs gray, thicker vs thinner. floor: bar vs area.

explicit_negations: No realistic wood texture or grain detail
Not attached to cage bars visually
Does not bend under Echo's weight
